title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: Asia-Pacific is executing the world's most diverse regulatory buildout—9 jurisdictions across four sub-regions are simultaneously finalizing VASP licensing frameworks, institutional custody standards, and AML enforcement regimes through Q3 2026. Australia's AUSTRAC shifts from implementation to active Travel Rule enforcement while Hong Kong, South Korea, and Thailand expand institutional access. Southeast Asian regulators are racing to implement custody standards and VASP registration before Q3

regulators.focus: Stablecoin licensing, travel rule enforcement, DPT oversight
